== Notes for [[Item:Q106773|Q106773]] ==

From ''Banu Taym'' Tribe (Part of ''Banu Quraysh'' Tribe).

Source: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Asma_bint_Abi_Bakr
--------------------
From ''Banu Azd'' Tribe.

Source: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Um_Ruman

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000008474713211

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
